section_content: Economics v1 is a proxy-first treatment pricing economics layer built from the locked treatment menu and approved source spine.
Includes locked menu price, proxy material cost, proxy labor cost, proxy overhead cost, pre-overhead gross profit proxy, and post-overhead net profit proxy at treatment level.
Does not yet include explicit hourly loaded therapist wage engine, SSC breakout formula by category, rent absorption engine, utilization-driven labor absorption, or true material BOM costing.
In v1 proxy logic, gross profit is pre-overhead and net profit is post-overhead. This has been validated against the locked treatment menu proxy structure.
Official statutory references used in the broader model foundation are Malta minimum wage 2026, employer SSC 2026, and Malta VAT rate, all documented as verified-ready source snapshots.
Salary and rent benchmarks are provisionally accepted and draft-ready, but not yet fully final. Salary remains role-adjacent and rent remains listing-derived.
Economics v1 validation checks passed for all current treatment rows under the confirmed locked-sheet proxy definitions.

V2 should replace proxy-first logic with assumption-driven economics: hourly loaded labor cost, SSC decomposition, rent absorption by sqm and capacity, utilization logic, material true cost, and explicit VAT basis handling.
